pass_1.bdr_summary: TwoFaced - Adversarial AI validation service where Claude advocates for startup ideas while ChatGPT attacks them, producing honest structured verdicts. Pay-per-analysis model targeting solo founders who need pressure-testing beyond single AI yes-machines.

economics_snapshot.target_customer: Solo founders 35-55 with day jobs building side projects
economics_snapshot.audience_scale_guess: 10K+ solo founders using AI for validation

questions_for_hero: Confirm API cost targets under $0.40 per analysis
Review structured verdict output format preferences

pass_2.approved_bdr: TwoFaced - Adversarial AI validation service using Claude as advocate and ChatGPT as adversary to produce structured startup idea verdicts. Pay-per-analysis model with Stripe integration, targeting solo founders needing honest pressure-testing.
pass_2.hld_document: Single-page web app with text input form. Backend orchestrates parallel API calls to OpenAI (adversary role) and Anthropic (advocate role). Synthesis engine combines responses into structured verdict with strengths, flaws, conflicts, questions, recommendation. Stripe checkout before analysis. No user accounts required. 60-second max processing time with progress indicators.
engineering_questions: Prompt engineering strategy for consistent adversarial quality
Error handling for API failures or timeouts
Rate limiting and abuse prevention without accounts

pass_3.qa_hlt_document: Test dual-API orchestration with mock responses. Validate synthesis logic produces consistent structured output. Test Stripe payment flow end-to-end. Verify timeout handling and error states. Test with various idea complexity levels.

test_vectors.description: Standard idea submission with successful dual API response
OpenAI API failure with graceful degradation

risk_register.description: API cost overrun due to prompt inefficiency

qa_questions_for_engineering: Fallback strategy if one API is down
Cost monitoring and circuit breaker implementation

combined_task_list.description: Setup Node.js backend with Express framework
Integrate OpenAI SDK for adversary role prompts
Integrate Anthropic SDK for advocate role prompts
Build synthesis engine for structured verdict output
Create single-page frontend with input form
Connect frontend to backend API endpoints
Test dual-API orchestration with various inputs
Validate payment flow and error handling
End-to-end testing with real startup ideas

pass_5.proposal_document_for_hero: TwoFaced MVP - 10-day build plan for adversarial AI validation service. Delivers pay-per-analysis platform using Claude advocate vs ChatGPT adversary model. Core features: single-page input, dual API orchestration, structured verdict synthesis, Stripe integration. Target: $5-10 per analysis, 60-second turnaround, API costs under $0.40. Ready for solo founder execution with clear technical milestones and hero touchpoints every 2 days.

hero_questions: Confirm API rate limits for expected volume
Review prompt templates for adversarial consistency
